title: Rock Your Socks Off
description: Adds a whole bunch of socks to your game. Each pair of socks give you a special effect.
body:
![RYSO logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef875ccc82f3bbcd81c65e05bdcb090c5f3f206.png)

This is a silly mod about a whole bunch of colorful socks with varying magical abilities that range from simple buffs to powerful new abilities.
Make socks to fight tooth and nail, make socks to befriend unlikely allies or make socks to look snazzy! It's all up to you what you do with these powerful pieces of footware.

For the best experience possible, the Trinkets API is strongly recommended, as it adds a new slot for the socks to go in without taking up the boots slot. However it is not required to run the mod.

Currently RYSO has 18 pairs of socks:
- Blank socks
- Light grey socks
- Grey socks
- Black socks
- Brown socks
- Red socks
- Orange socks
- Yellow socks
- Lime socks
- Green socks
- Cyan socks
- Light blue socks
- Blue socks
- Purple socks
- Magenta socks
- Pink socks
- Rainbow socks
- Jolly socks
